text:
ṭwba' l'nasha' dla' ḥderi' bra'yy dbyshi': 
wb'wrḥa' dḥaṭayi' la' klili': 
wbmawtba' dmasḥerani' la' ytebli'.

'ela' bnamwsih dmarya' rezayih: 
wbnamwsih ki' hagi' 'ymama' wlayli'.

wbet hawi' 'ayk 'ylana' shtyla' 'al shaqyati' dmya': 
dṭ'wntwhy ki' yahbel bzabnwhy: 
wṭarpih li' kamek: 
wkl d'abed ki' manti'.

la' hadka' byshi': 
'ela' 'ayk tebna' ddari' lih pawḥa'.

bwt d'aha': li' kaly byshi' bdywn: 
wḥaṭayi' bgama'at dzadyqi'.

sabab dki' yade' marya' 'wrḥa' dzadyqi': 
w'wrḥa' dbyshi' bet ṭalqa'.
